is_big_launch.q: Is this a major launch (not a minor feature) with days_until_launch ≥ 7 and real proof (metric, funding, partnership, or named design partner)?

has_press_kit_assets.q: Can you ship press kit PDF + 3 product screenshots + approved founder quote within 5 business days?

has_embargo_datetime.q: Is launch_datetime_utc fixed and shareable under embargo with all stakeholders aligned?

press_relationship_check.q: Do you have ≥1 warm reporter intro OR prior coverage in the last 18 months?

have_customer_proof_permission.q: Do you have named customer proof (logo, metric, or quote) with written permission?

aggressive_ready_check.q: Is days_until_launch ≥ 14 and can you personalize 5 reporter pitches with beat-specific hooks?
